props.rounded: Designates the **border-radius** applied to the component. You can use the predefined sizes **0**, **xs**, **sm**, **md**, **lg**, **xl**, **pill**, **circle**, and **shaped**, pass `true` for the component default. Since v4.1 you can also provide any valid CSS value (e.g. `8px`, `50%`, `1em`) or number (converted to `px`). Find more information on available border radius classes on the [Border Radius page](/styles/border-radius).
props.tile: Removes any applied **border-radius** from the component.
